title: Device Settings - Pair Headset with Charge Stand
feature: Device Settings - Pair Headset with Charge Stand
scenario: Verify that Charge Stand information appears in Device Settings > Software Update after placing a turned-on headset on the stand, and persists after removing the headset, restarting the device, and restarting the app, when the headset was not previously paired with the stand.
steps: 1. Ensure the headset is paired with the app but NOT paired with the charge stand (no Charge Stand info visible in Device Settings > Software Update).
2. Place a turned-on headset on the charge stand.
3. Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update and verify that information about the Charge Stand is displayed.
4. Remove the headset from the charge stand.
7. Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update again and verify that the Charge Stand information is still displayed.
expected: After placing a turned-on headset on the charge stand, the Device Settings > Software Update tab displays information about the Charge Stand. This info persists after removing the headset from the stand, restarting the device, and restarting the app.
